other_findings.finding: Mac2 is more closely aligned with fetal macrophages than Mac1
Mac2 increases in AD and psoriasis lesional skin
Adult healthy skin Mac2 aligns with fetal skin, gut, kidney, liver and thymus macrophages
91 conserved genes between Mac2 and fetal macrophages identified by FindConservedMarkers

evidence_quotes.quote: Mac2 is characterized by the expression of F13A1 and transcription factors associated with alternative activation and suppression of immune responses (NR4A1, NR4A2, KLF4) and notably, is more closely aligned with fetal macrophages
We observed an increase in Mac2 in AD and psoriasis skin
